The question is asking to determine the time difference in years between the first race (minimum year) and the last race (maximum year). Since we have a "year" column with date type data, we need to sort the years using the f_sort_column(year) operation with the order "small to large" to identify the first and last years, then subtract the first from the last to get the duration.
The first race was in 1926 and the last race was in 1939. To find the length in years, subtract the first year from the last year: 1939 - 1926 = 13 years.

judge_thought: Explanation: The original table provides data from multiple years, starting from 1926 (row 1) and ending in 1939 (row 13). To find the duration between the first and last race, subtract the earliest year from the latest year: 1939 - 1926 = 13 years.
